title: Repair Anvil
body: ![simple and intuitive image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbe3ac5cb9e1b9e1a0d0b4745d7fd9a91a8a0f13.png)A lightweight Minecraft plugin that allows players to repair damaged and chipped anvils by right-clicking them with iron blocks plays a repair sound audible to nearby players.
